title: AFK Client
description: A client for afking or automation.
body:
![AFK Client Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbe53e9382333152761e7c6da055be9c11b14829.png)

AFK CLient is a client built for the afkers.  It Features:
- Auto Cicker
- Auto Sprint
- Auto Fish
- Auto Walk
- Optimization for servers with lots of players
- AND MORE!

**Disclaimer!  You may get banned from servers if you misues some of the features in this modpack, please read your server's rules and configure the modpack as needed**
